title: centaurea glandulifera
intro: Centaurea glandulifera, also known as the Sticky Michael or Sticky Centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Centaurea glandulifera include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. Centaurea glandulifera can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
